mnemonics: McGraw Hill's IoT: Connecting Core Pillars
keyPoints: McGraw Hill India provides educational content and resources related to IoT.
Module 5 likely covers specific IoT protocols, security, or application case studies.
The content is structured to build foundational knowledge into more complex IoT system understanding.
commonMistakes: Assuming 'McGraw Hill India' is the topic itself, rather than the source of the learning material.
Focusing on the publisher name instead of the actual IoT concepts covered in the module.
Confusing the module number (5) with a specific protocol or standard (e.g., mistaking it for 5G).
